CVE-2011-3699.title: John Lim ADOdb Library for PHP 5.11 allows remote attackers to ob ...
CVE-2011-3699.description: John Lim ADOdb Library for PHP 5.11 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information via a direct request to a .php file, which reveals the installation path in an error message, as demonstrated by tests/test-active-record.php and certain other files.

CVE-2021-3850.description: Authentication Bypass by Primary Weakness in GitHub repository adodb/adodb prior to 5.20.21.
